module.name: legend
module.description: A colour legend / key — swatches with labels, laid out in a row or column. Pairs with charts, maps and diagrams.
module.aiSpec:
A colour LEGEND / key — coloured swatches next to labels. Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->`, one entry per section written `#color: Label` (or `colorname | Label`), e.g. `#ef4444: Errors`. Use it to explain the colours in a chart, diagram or map on the same slide (it does not draw the chart itself).
Parameters: - `direction` (row|column, default row): row wraps horizontally; column stacks. - `shape` (square|circle|line, default square): swatch shape. - `size` (small|medium|large, default medium): swatch size. - `gap`: CSS gap between entries (default 8px 18px). - `bold` (true|false, default false): bold the labels.
Example: <!-- @legend direction: column, shape: circle, size: large --> #22c55e: Passing <!-- @ --> #f59e0b: Flaky <!-- @ --> #ef4444: Failing <!-- @end -->

param.name: direction
param.label: Direction
param.desc: Lay entries in a wrapping row or a vertical column.

snippet.label: Legend (color key)
snippet.description: Colour swatches with labels. Each section: "#color: Label".
